summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OSCILLATE underground techno collective platform - Iteration 5 FINAL BUILD. Successfully tested all new features including GOD PIN 1812 with analytics, search API, WhatsApp ticket integration, event attendance tracking, security headers, and mobile responsiveness. Backend APIs (49/49) working perfectly. Frontend 100% functional with all new features working correctly.
passed_tests: All 49 backend API endpoints (100% success) - 8 new endpoints added
GOD PIN 1812 authenticates with role=god and label=GOD MODE
GOD mode shows 5 tabs: Issue Ticket, Door Data, Promoter Sales, Scan, and ANALYTICS
Analytics tab loads with live data: total tickets/revenue, revenue by method bars, revenue by event, source breakdown, promoter leaderboard
Search endpoint /api/search?q=techno returns events and artists (26 events, 18 results found)
WhatsApp link endpoint /api/ticket/{id}/whatsapp returns wa.me URL with ticket details
WhatsApp link works with and without phone number parameter
Event interested endpoint POST /api/events/{id}/interested increments count
Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu visible and functional on mobile viewport (390px)
Mobile menu opens with navigation links including POS and ADMIN
Search dropdown opens from nav, shows results for events and artists
Cart icon shows item count badge correctly
Phone field on booking modal labeled 'PHONE (FOR WHATSAPP TICKET)'
Landing page loads all sections on mobile viewport: hero, marquee, stats, gallery, events, artists, merch, platform, footer
POS pages work on mobile viewport - GOD mode interface fully functional
Admin panel works on mobile viewport with all tabs (Events, Artists, Tickets)
All previous features still working: events, artists, merch, newsletter, POS master/S1/S2, Stripe checkout, QR codes, email
Event detail page booking modal with phone field for WhatsApp delivery
All POS PIN authentication working: GOD (1812), Master (9969), S1 (0051), S2 (0052)
Analytics endpoint requires proper PIN authorization (401 for invalid PIN)
Search functionality returns relevant results for techno events and artists
Empty search query returns empty arrays as expected
WhatsApp ticket link generation includes ticket ID and event details
Event interested API increments count correctly
All security headers implemented according to OWASP guidelines
Mobile hamburger menu shows POS and ADMIN navigation links
Admin panel authentication and tab navigation working on mobile
Search dropdown functionality working with real-time results
Cart badge functionality working (shows item count)
All backend endpoints tested: events, artists, gallery, stats, merch, POS, admin, analytics, search, WhatsApp, interested
Server-side pricing validation for both event and merch checkout
QR code generation and ticket scanning functionality
Email integration configured (Resend API)
Rate limiting and input sanitization working
Database seeding with 12 events, 16 artists, 12 gallery images, 9 merch items
